prompt: Acabei de migrar o OpenClaw para bare-metal no Optiplex — o hostname agora é `lm-claw`, IP `192.168.3.30`, rodando Debian diretamente (sem Proxmox). Olha quais docs precisam ser atualizados e me mostra exatamente o que mudaria.

assertions.text: Identifies homelab-implementation-report.html as a file needing updates
Identifies docs/homelab-context.md as a file needing updates
Mentions 'lm-claw' as the new hostname in the proposed changes
Mentions bare-metal or Debian as the new deployment type
Asks for user approval before making any changes
Does not actually modify any documentation files without approval
